hero.title: THE TEE, REFINED.
hero.sub: Made from Sonoma fabric with a premium handfeel, a cleaner build, and the kind of finish that only comes from expensive production.

visual.title: Built with a denser handfeel and a cleaner drape.
visual.body: The page is designed to feel tactile and premium before the tee even lands — more atmosphere, more depth, and a stronger drop identity.

fabric.label: MATERIAL
fabric.title: SONOMA FABRIC
fabric.body: Sonoma gives the tee a dense, elevated handfeel with a clean drape that holds its shape while still wearing comfortably.

build.label: CONSTRUCTION
build.title: MADE TO FEEL EXPENSIVE
build.body: The details are intentionally precise: a cleaner silhouette, a more substantial body, and finishing that reflects the production cost behind it.

run.label: DROP STRATEGY
run.title: SMALL, INTENTIONAL RUN
run.body: This launch is kept tight by design so quality stays the priority from sampling to final production.

tee.manifesto: The tee should feel like the best shirt in the room — heavy, clean, and built with real intent.
tee.footerText: The next Driip drop is coming in Sonoma fabric. Built premium, kept limited.
